# Urban Churn

> Craft ice cream creamery in Central Pennsylvania — unique flavors, natural ingredients, nothing fake.

Urban Churn is a super premium craft ice cream company based in Central PA. We use 16% butterfat local PA dairy, no artificial colors or flavors, and create culturally-inspired unique flavors in small batches.

## Locations

- Carlisle: 45 W High St, Carlisle, PA 17013
- Mechanicsburg, PA
- Harrisburg, PA

Phone: 717-884-9396
Website: https://urbanchurn.com

## Key Pages

- [Pre-Order Ice Cream](https://urbanchurn.com/pre-order): Browse and pre-order craft ice cream for pickup
- [Locations & Hours](https://urbanchurn.com/locations): Store locations, hours, and live menus
- [Events](https://urbanchurn.com/events): Tastings, pop-ups, trivia nights, and festivals
- [Catering](https://urbanchurn.com/catering): Ice cream catering for weddings, corporate events, and parties
- [Wholesale](https://urbanchurn.com/wholesale): B2B ice cream for restaurants, shops, and scoop bars
- [Fundraising](https://urbanchurn.com/fundraising): School and nonprofit fundraiser programs
- [Custom Cakes](https://urbanchurn.com/bakery): Order custom ice cream cakes and baked cakes
- [Careers](https://urbanchurn.com/careers): Job openings at our Central PA locations
- [About](https://urbanchurn.com/about): Our story and values
- [Contact](https://urbanchurn.com/contact): Get in touch

## Products

We offer craft ice cream in multiple sizes available for pre-order and pickup. Our flavors rotate seasonally and include culturally-inspired creations like Mango Habanero, Sweet Potato Casserole, and more. All products use natural ingredients with no artificial colors or flavors.

## Services

- **Pre-Order & Pickup**: Order online, pick up at any location
- **Catering**: Full ice cream bar setup for events
- **Wholesale**: B2B supply for restaurants and retailers (PA Preferred certified)
- **Fundraising**: Pints for Purpose (35% profit for schools), Scoop for Funds (30% for nonprofits)
- **Custom Cakes**: Ice cream cakes and baked cakes in 6", 7", and 8" sizes

## Extended Info
